channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: News Article: Detailed Analysis of User Instructions
item.description: This article discusses a user's request to generate a structured JSON response containing specific fields related to a news article. The user emphasizes the need for accurate extraction of the origina...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's Wedding: A Cultural Phenomenon
item.description: The article discusses the highly anticipated wedding of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, highlighting its significance as a cultural event coinciding with the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Ind...

item.title: Empty Exhibits and Corporate Sponsors at Trump's American State Fair
item.description: The Great American State Fair, hosted by President Donald Trump, faced sparse attendance and criticism for its politicized atmosphere. Reporters observed empty exhibits, including a baptism pool and a...

item.title: Nollywood Actress Adunni Ade Sues Google Over Dino Melaye Allegations, Secures ₦30 Million Settlement
item.description: Nollywood actress Adunni Ade has secured a ₦30 million judgment against Google after a Lagos High Court ruled in her favor over stories linking her to former senator Dino Melaye. The case, filed in Ju...

item.title: Wimbledon 2026: Djokovic eyes 25th grand slam as top players advance
item.description: The Wimbledon 2026 tournament is in full swing, with Novak Djokovic making a strong push for his 25th Grand Slam title. The Serbian star, now 39, defeated former world No. 3 Stefanos Tsitsipas in stra...

item.title: Pakistani leaders attend funeral of Iranian supreme leader Khamenei
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Chief of Defence Forces Field Marshal Asim Munir attended the funeral of Iranian supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in a US-Israeli strike. Khamene...

item.title: Jaecoo J5 to be locally built at Chery’s new Rosslyn manufacturing facility in South Africa
item.description: Omoda & Jaecoo South Africa has confirmed that the Jaecoo J5 compact SUV will be among the first models to enter production at Chery Group’s newly established manufacturing facility in Rosslyn, locate...

item.title: Panthers secure crucial NRL win with Dylan Edwards' try against Rabbitohs
item.description: The Penrith Panthers delivered a commanding performance against the South Sydney Rabbitohs, with fullback Dylan Edwards opening the scoring with a stunning 60-metre solo try. The try, which came just ...

item.title: IMD issues red alert for Mumbai, Thane and Palghar amid forecast of heavy to very heavy rainfall
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued a red alert for Mumbai, Thane, and Palghar, warning of heavy to very heavy rainfall over the next 24 hours, with extremely heavy showers likely at ...

item.title: Trump's Unusual Comments on Wind Turbines and Wildlife During Call with UK PM
item.description: During Donald Trump's first phone call with British Prime Minister Keir Starmer, the former U.S. president deviated from his usual topics to discuss wind turbines and their alleged impact on wildlife....

item.title: Johannesburg man sentenced to life imprisonment for murdering girlfriend after birthday assault
item.description: A Johannesburg High Court has sentenced Katlego Solomon Ledwaba, aged 33, to life imprisonment for the murder of his girlfriend, Agnes Thabane, following a brutal domestic violence incident that began...

item.title: Dwight Ramos Commends Gilas Pilipinas' Resilience After Double-Overtime Defeat to New Zealand
item.description: Gilas Pilipinas guard Dwight Ramos expressed his appreciation for the team’s determination and fighting spirit despite suffering a hard-fought double-overtime loss against New Zealand in a recent inte...

item.title: AI in Real Estate Listings and Condo Discounts: Key Trends in Canadian Housing Market
item.description: The article explores critical developments in Canada's real estate market, focusing on three main themes: the rise of artificial intelligence in property listings, the use of non-disclosure agreements...

item.title: US Life Expectancy Hits Record High Amid Declining Death Rates
item.description: The United States' age-adjusted death rate reached a record low in 2025, contributing to a potential record high in life expectancy. According to the CDC, the death rate dropped to 689 per 100,000 peo...

item.title: Kenyan Man Forgives Ex After Heartbreaking Breakup
item.description: A video of a Kenyan man emotionally breaking down after a painful breakup has gone viral on social media, sparking mixed reactions. The clip shows the young man, visibly heartbroken, expressing his pa...

item.title: Debate over USAID funding cuts intensifies after Lancet report on global mortality, with criticism directed at Elon Musk
item.description: The article discusses growing international controversy following a report associated with The Lancet that links reductions in USAID funding to a large number of global deaths, estimated at around 14 ...

item.title: Khampepe commission continues inquiry into alleged delays in TRC-related prosecutions
item.description: The Khampepe commission of inquiry is continuing its hearings into allegations that efforts were made to stall investigations and prosecutions linked to apartheid-era crimes dealt with under the Truth...

item.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei's Funeral and International Response
item.description: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Iran's supreme leader, was assassinated in a US-Israeli strike on February 28. His funeral, delayed during the Middle East conflict, is now taking place as Iran and the US upho...

item.title: Africa's Economic Challenges and Investment Risks in a Shifting Global Landscape
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing debate about the bias in credit ratings assigned by the Big Three agencies (Moody's, S&P, Fitch) toward African countries and the proposed African Credit Rating Agenc...

item.title: UP Open University releases July–December 2026 schedule for 25 free self-paced online courses
item.description: The University of the Philippines Open University (UPOU) has announced its Massive Open Online Course (MOOC) offerings for the period of July to December 2026, providing learners access to 25 free, se...
